title: Store favorited board views server-side, not client-side
excerpt:
Every time I clear Chrome browsing history/ cache, I lose my favorited board views. 
Is there any possibility this could be changed? I’d love if there was a way to keep favorited boards in your board after clearing your …

posts.author: paulinlalasko (Paulina Laskowska)
posts.cookedHtml:
Every time I clear Chrome browsing history/ cache, I lose my favorited board views.

Is there any possibility this could be changed? I’d love if there was a way to keep favorited boards in your board after clearing your cache!
